title: Daily Briefing — Thursday, May 28
tldr: Play: stop staring at a blank prompt — let the Console write and improve it for you. Anthropic's prompt generator drafts a structured prompt for your task; the prompt improver upgrades one you already have.
The day's flagship-launch and valuation headlines were news; the durable, run-it-today prompting move is below.

sections.h: Run it today: a better prompt in two clicks

blocks.sub: Beat the blank-page problem (and weak prompts)
blocks.p: Payoff: a well-structured, best-practice prompt in seconds instead of trial-and-error — clearer instructions, examples, and reasoning steps that measurably lift output quality.
blocks.doIt: Open the Claude Console prompting tools. Use the prompt generator: describe your task (classify support tickets by urgency and topic) and it outputs a full prompt template with variables. Already have a prompt that underperforms? Paste it into the prompt improver, add a note on what's wrong (summaries are too basic for experts), and it rewrites with chain-of-thought and clean structure.
blocks.note: The resulting structure ports to other chatbots too — generate once, reuse anywhere.

sources: Anthropic — Console prompting tools (generator + improver)
